subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the Lord of all beings, Who through His exalted Word hath summoned the dwellers of the earthly realm unto the highest horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مولی الوری را لایق و سزاست که بکلمه علیا اهل ناسوت انشا را بافق اعلی دعوت
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @call to action
